7 #include "IXMStaticMeshBuilder.h"

11 
12 #include <arcane/IMeshSubMeshTransition.h>
13 #include <arcane/IPrimaryMesh.h>
14 #include <arcane/ISubDomain.h>
15 
16 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
17 
18 ArcGeoSim::IXMStaticMeshBuilder::
19 IXMStaticMeshBuilder(Arcane::ISubDomain* subdomain)
20  : IXMMeshBuilderBase(subdomain->defaultMesh(),subdomain->traceMng(),subdomain->parallelMng(),IXMMeshType::StaticMesh)
21 {}
22 
23 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
24 
25 void
26 ArcGeoSim::IXMStaticMeshBuilder::
27 setDimension(Arcane::IPrimaryMesh* mesh, const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMMeshDimension mesh_dimension)
28 {
29  IXMMeshBuilderBase::staticInit(mesh);
30  mesh->setDimension(mesh_dimension());
31 }
32 
33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 
35 void
36 ArcGeoSim::IXMStaticMeshBuilder::
37 addCells(Arcane::IPrimaryMesh* mesh, const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMCellData& cell_data)
38 {
39  IXMMeshBuilderBase::manageCellOperations(mesh,cell_data,IXMCellData(),IXMCellData(),IXMCellIncrementPartitionInfo(),true);
40 }
41 
42 
43 void
44 ArcGeoSim::IXMStaticMeshBuilder::
45 setNodeCoordinates(Arcane::IPrimaryMesh* mesh, const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMNodeData& node_data)
46 {
47  IXMMeshBuilderBase::manageUpdatedNodes(mesh,node_data,IXMClonedNodeData(),true);
48 }
49 
50 void
51 ArcGeoSim::IXMStaticMeshBuilder::
52 addGroups(Arcane::IPrimaryMesh* mesh, const ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMGroupDataList& group_data_list,const IXMUidToLidMng& uid2lid_mng)
53 {
54  for (IXMGroupDataList::const_iterator ite = group_data_list.begin(); ite != group_data_list.end(); ++ite)
55  {
56  IXMMeshBuilderBase::manageGroup(mesh,*ite,"reset",uid2lid_mng,true);
57  }
58 }
59
